data.title: TRUMP memecoin drops 10% after investor gala, down 96% from peak.
data.description: The value of TRUMP memecoin dropped by almost 10% within a day, even after a high-profile investor gala at Mar-a-Lago. The cryptocurrency is currently trading over 96% lower than its highest value.

data.title: Trump administration implements erratic sanctions on Russia and Iran due to fluctuating oil prices in economic warfare.
data.description: The current administration, considering the impact of oil prices, has implemented sanctions on Russia and Iran in a disorganized manner.

data.title: 3 journalists traced U.S. Govt gold to cartel - revealed Mint purchases gold from foreign sources, claiming it's U.S. gold.
data.description: Three journalists investigated the sourcing practices of the U.S. Mint and found that it purchases gold from overseas pawn shops and illegal sources, including drug dealers. The Mint then falsely presents this gold as originating from within the United States.

data.title: Increasing expenses lead many couples to reconsider having children, due to high mortgage and child care fees.
data.description: Rising mortgage payments, increased child care expenses, and a sense of economic instability are causing individuals to reconsider their decision to start a family. This is particularly evident as families are facing an average increase of 10%  in mortgage payments and a 15% spike in child care costs. The uncertain economic climate has further intensified these concerns, leading many to reassess their family planning.

data.title: States like Illinois aimed to halt chronic wasting disease with targeted hunts, but are losing hope as progress wanes.
data.description: In various states, including Illinois, officials were optimistic that culling efforts would help stop the spread of chronic wasting disease. However, their optimism has waned as the disease continues to advance.

data.title: A.I. firms showcase their immense energy capacities in 'Bragawatts,' utilizing exaggerated claims to set themselves apart.
data.description: One strategy for a business to distinguish itself or to potentially threaten competitors is by making unverified claims about the extent of power it possesses.

data.title: Qwen AI Glasses Witness Grand Opening of China Intangible Cultural Heritage Crafts Exhibition at Milan Design Week
data.description: In Milan, the China Intangible Cultural Heritage Crafts Exhibition commenced on April 20 at Milan University. The exhibition, co-curated by Davide Rampello and Sun Ruoxi, showcased Chinese ICH through videos and an art installation, highlighting traditional crafts. The perspective was portrayed from an AI wearable device called Qwen AI Glasses, attracting global attention during Design Week. The event displayed cultural heritage using innovative technology, garnering significant interest worldwide.

data.title: The Building & Furniture Category Highlights Sustainable and Human‑Centric Design at the 139th Canton Fair
data.description: In Guangzhou, China, during April 26, 2026, the 139th Canton Fair's Phase 2 has showcased the Building & Furniture category with a focus on green Infrastructure and human-centric design. A significant feature of the building and decorative materials section is the launch of photovoltaic technology.

data.title: Fear engulfs White House Correspondents’ Dinner as shots were fired, causing panic among attendees.
data.description: An emergency situation at the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner caused alarm among prominent politicians and journalists.

data.title: Wynn Honors the Top-Tier Wines of China at the 2026 Wynn Signature Chinese Wine Awards Ceremony
data.description: Wynn recently announced the names of 36 trophy winners and kicked off celebratory wine dinners, marking the start of a global promotional tour for its acclaimed wines. This initiative is being carried out in collaboration with the Macao Government Tourism Office (MGTO) and the Commerce and Investment Promotion Institute. The event took place in Macao on April 26, 2026.

data.title: Fear and chaos swept through the Washington Hilton Ballroom during a White House Correspondents’ Association dinner emergency.
data.description: An atmosphere of fear quickly spread among prominent political figures and media professionals when a crisis erupted at the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner.

data.title: Auto China 2026: LEPAS Unveils NEV Portfolio, Kicking Off Its «Year of Delivery»
data.description: At Auto China 2026, LEPAS made its debut by revealing its lineup of new energy vehicles (NEVs) and global strategy. This marks the beginning of their Year of Delivery, as they aim to expand elegant mobility worldwide. The company is showcasing its latest offerings to consumers, including electric cars and other sustainable transportation options. This move signifies an important step for LEPAS as they look to establish themselves in the market.

data.title: CFTC sues NY over clash on prediction markets, challenging state's bid to apply gambling laws. Regulatory tensions rise.
data.description: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) is disputing New York's attempt to enforce gambling regulations on prediction markets, intensifying the conflict between federal and state regulatory authorities. This move has raised concerns and is part of a larger trend of regulatory tensions between the two entities. The disagreement signifies a clash in jurisdiction over the handling of prediction markets and their management. This development underscores a significant issue in the regulatory realm as the CFTC contests New York's efforts to impose gambling laws on prediction markets, indicating a notable struggle in the ongoing regulatory landscape.

data.title: Product Recall: PC® Cola
data.description: In Brampton, Ontario on April 25, 2026, Loblaw Companies Limited has issued a recall for specific cases of PC® Cola (12 x 355 ML) products with UPC 060383787035 due to precautionary measures.

data.title: Qorvis Hosts White House Correspondents' Dinner Watch Party at Butterworth's Featuring Raheem Kassam
data.description: On April 25, 2026, Qorvis Holding Inc., a top global strategic communications and advisory firm, organized a special event at Butterworth's on Capitol Hill. The occasion was an exclusive Watch Party for the White House Correspondents' Dinner (WHCD), gathering together guests to enjoy the evening. Butterworth's, known as one of Capitol Hill's prominent spots, saw a significant turnout for the event, highlighting the firm's influence in the industry.

data.title: SK hynix receives 2026 IEEE Corporate Innovation Award for Driving AI Computing Expansion with HBM
data.description: SK hynix was recognized at the 2026 IEEE Awards for their groundbreaking AI technology innovation using HBM. Their efforts have significantly contributed to the global AI computing landscape through consistent production across all HBM iterations. The company aims to solidify its position as a top player in AI innovation by partnering with industry leaders worldwide.

data.title: Toncoin at $1.35 consolidates as smart money buys in, breakout to $1.51 expected within two weeks. Technical signals positive.
data.description: Toncoin is currently trading at $1.35, experiencing a period of consolidation, while institutional buyers are preparing for potential price increases. Technical analysis suggests a breakout could occur in the next two weeks, with the price projected to reach $1.51.

data.title: SHIB likely to break below $0.000006 in 7 days. MACD momentum at $0.00000622 signals a drop to $0.000006 support. Technical indicators suggest 65% chance of further downside.
data.description: The MACD momentum for SHIB is bearish at a price of $0.00000622, suggesting a potential decline to the support level of $0.000006. Technical indicators indicate a 65% likelihood of more downside movement before any chance of a recovery.

data.title: Worldcoin's $0.26 price faces resistance as momentum slows. $0.23 support may be tested with 65% chance before hitting $0.32.
data.description: The price of Worldcoin currently stands at $0.26, where bearish technical indicators are conflicting with signs of bullishness from large investors. This situation has led to a 65% chance of the cryptocurrency dropping to the $0.23 support level before potentially seeing a significant increase towards the challenging $0.32 resistance mark.

data.title: SUI expected to hit $1.10 in 30 days, as 68% of whales are long and price above 21-day MA shows strong accumulation. Breakout likely if above $0.93.
data.description: 68% of whales are currently holding long positions in SUI, with strong accumulation patterns observed above the 21-day Moving Average. This indicates a potential breakout towards $1.10. However, if the price falls below $0.93, it could lead to a capitulation down to $0.
